name: environmental_knowledge_literacy
description: Measures the respondent's self-assessed and objective knowledge about environmental problems, their causes, solutions, and renewable energy, capturing environmental literacy as a latent cognitive construct.

name: environmental_concern_risk_perception
description: Captures the degree to which respondents perceive environmental problems as serious threats at national and local levels, including concern about specific issues such as climate change and fossil fuel impacts.

name: pro_environmental_civic_engagement
description: Measures the extent to which respondents have taken collective or civic action to address environmental issues, reflecting behavioral mobilization beyond individual lifestyle choices.

name: environmental_governance_attitudes
description: Captures respondents' beliefs about who bears responsibility for environmental protection and the appropriate role of government and companies in regulating environmental behavior.

name: socioeconomic_environmental_context
description: Measures the material and infrastructural conditions of respondents' households and communities that shape both environmental exposure and adaptive capacity, serving as a proxy for socio-environmental vulnerability.
